Aspose.Font Convert Micro Application 26.2.0

  -i, --input      Required. The path to the input font file.

  -o, --output     Required. The path for the converted font.

  -f, --format     The format for the converted font.

  -l, --license    The path to the Aspose.Font .NET license file.

  -v, --verbose    (Default: false) Enable verbose output for detailed logging.
